title: And So They Were Married
writer: Doris Anderson, Joseph Anthony, A. Laurie Brazee
actors: Melvyn Douglas, Mary Astor, Edith Fellows
plot: A bitter divorce and a grumpy widower find themselves stuck in a hotel cut off by a snowstorm, and begin to fall for each other. Their children, however, are determined to see that the romance never gets off the ground.
